title: A Quiet Morning in the Park

people.description: an elderly man in a grey cardigan and flat cap
a young woman in a bright orange running jacket

objects.name: wooden park bench
objects.detail: green painted slats with cast-iron armrests

objects.name: stone fountain

objects.name: large oak tree
objects.detail: thick trunk casting a long morning shadow

model_answer: This picture shows a quiet park on a sunny morning. In the foreground on the left, an elderly man wearing a grey cardigan and a flat cap is sitting on a green wooden bench, reading his newspaper. The bench sits in the shade of a large oak tree behind him. In the centre of the park there is a round stone fountain with a small jet of water. In the background on the right, a young woman in a bright orange running jacket is jogging along the path, just passing the fountain. Overall, it looks like a calm and peaceful start to the day.

spatial_relationships.subject: o_pastry_case
spatial_relationships.relation: is at the right end of

model_answer: This is a busy corner café on a rainy morning. Behind the counter at the back, a barista in a black apron is steaming milk at a chrome espresso machine, and a chalkboard menu hangs above her. At the right end of the counter there is a glass pastry case full of croissants, and a man in a navy suit is waiting in front of it, checking his phone while holding a wet umbrella. In the foreground on the right, a student wearing headphones is typing on a laptop at a small window table; you can see rain streaking the glass behind him. In the back left corner, a mother in a yellow raincoat is wiping the table while her little boy kneels on his chair and waves at the door. Next to the entrance, a metal umbrella stand is already crowded with dripping umbrellas, with a leafy potted fern standing beside it. Three matching marble-topped bistro tables are dotted around the room, and at each one sits what looks like the same man in a different coloured t-shirt — one in red reading the sports pages under a warm brass pendant lamp, one in green typing on a laptop, and one in blue drinking a flat white. A narrow bookshelf full of worn paperbacks stands against the back wall, and a station clock with a brass rim hangs high above the pastry case, so it is clearly a wet and hectic start to the day.

title: A Scuba Diver at the Bus Stop

people.description: a man in a full scuba wetsuit, mask, and flippers
people.action: standing in the queue holding a transit pass
people.position: middle of the queue, foreground centre

people.description: a woman in a beige trench coat
people.action: glancing sideways at the diver while checking her watch
people.position: front of the queue, foreground left

people.action: taking a photo of the diver with his phone
people.position: back of the queue, foreground right

objects.name: leather briefcase
objects.detail: left unattended next to a folded jacket

anomaly.description: a man waiting for the bus in full scuba gear, including a mask, wetsuit, and flippers
anomaly.why_unusual: scuba equipment belongs in the ocean, not at a dry city bus stop nowhere near water, and flippers make it almost impossible to walk onto a bus
anomaly.position: middle of the queue, foreground centre

model_answer: This picture shows an ordinary city bus stop on a clear afternoon, but something very strange is happening. In the middle of the queue, a man is waiting for the bus dressed in a full scuba wetsuit, with a diving mask on his face and flippers on his feet, calmly holding a transit pass. This is bizarre because there is no water anywhere nearby — scuba gear belongs in the ocean, and it would be almost impossible to climb onto a bus wearing flippers. The people around him have clearly noticed: the woman in a trench coat at the front of the queue keeps glancing sideways at him while pretending to check her watch, and the teenager behind him is openly taking a photo with his phone. Behind them is a normal glass bus shelter with a route map, a metal bench with someone's briefcase on it, and a route 42 sign at the kerb, which makes the diver stand out even more. Perhaps he lost a bet, or he is on his way to a costume party.
